creator: linimon@FreeBSD.org
text:
^Triage:

The conflict is actually:

devel/onetbb (martymac@FreeBSD.org) vs.
devel/tbb (also martymac@FreeBSD.org)

which are depended on by

cad/PrusaSlicer (teodorsigaev@gmail.com) and
graphics/blender (FreeBSD@Shaneware.biz)

and so I'm merely going to Cc: all of them and let them decide.
